heading: Appointment of additional employees
label: 7408 Appointment of additional employees
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the repeal of that section as part of the complete revision of chapter 73 of this title by .section 4111 of this titlePub. L. 102–40

children.label: a
children.text: There shall be appointed by the Secretary under civil service laws, rules, and regulations, such additional employees, other than those provided in section 7306 and paragraphs (1) and (3) of and those specified in sections 7405 and 7406 of this title, as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this chapter.section 7401 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary, after considering an individual’s existing pay, higher or unique qualifications, or the special needs of the Department, may appoint the individual to a position in the Administration providing direct patient-care services or services incident to direct patient-services at a rate of pay above the minimum rate of the appropriate grade.
